noBooksFound: No books found matching your search
privacyContent:
We take your privacy seriously. This Privacy Policy describes how we collect, use, and protect your personal information when you use our Bookia application.

• We collect your name, email, and shipping address to process orders
• Your payment information is securely processed and not stored on our servers
• We do not share your personal data with third parties without your consent
• You can request deletion of your account and data at any time
termsContent:
By using the Bookia application, you agree to the following terms:

• You must be at least 13 years old to use this application
• You are responsible for maintaining the security of your account
• All purchases are subject to availability and pricing at the time of order
• We reserve the right to cancel orders in case of pricing errors
• Refunds are processed within 7-14 business days
returnContent:
• Items can be returned within 14 days of delivery
• Books must be in their original condition
• Damaged items during shipping are eligible for immediate replacement
• Digital products are non-refundable
privacyContactContent: If you have any questions about our privacy policy or terms of service, please contact us through the Contact Us page in the app.
weLoveToHear: We'd love to hear from you
subject: Subject
thanksContacting: Thank you for contacting us. We'll get back to you soon.
